---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Command run

```bash
sudo sondare ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full output or error message.

## Environment

- sondare version: <!-- run `sondare -V` -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15.4, Windows 11 -->
- Python version: <!-- run `python3 --version` -->
- Install method: <!-- pipx / from source -->
